title: Enterprise B-Series - MaiStorage
text:
Enterprise B-Series - MaiStorage
Skip to content
Boot Drive B-Series
Server performance starts at the core where applications and background tasks reside. MaiStorage’s B-Series boot drives are designed for reliability and I/O consistency, ensuring optimal results even in high-volume rack-scale environments.
B100
B100 Ultimate M.2 Boot Drive for Servers and Workstations
The M.2 2280 enterprise SSD, the B100, features fast PCIe Gen4x4 speeds paired with the industry’s latest 3D NAND, delivering industry-leading performance, reliability and efficiency.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
PCIe Gen4x4 Single Port
M.2 2280
Capacity
480 GB up to 960 GB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 8.5W
Idle: 3.5W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
5.0 GB/s
Seq Write (up to)
0.7 GB/s
Random Read (up to)
450 KIOPs
Random Write (up to)
30 KIOPs
BA50
BA50 High-Quality SATA Boot Drive for Legacy Systems and System Upgrades
BA50 is a purpose-built, high-performance boot drive for use in servers or workstations. This series offers faster boot times, improved system responsiveness, and enhanced overall performance.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
SATA III
M.2 2280, 2.5"
Capacity
240 GB up to 960 GB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 2.8W
Idle: 1.3W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
530 MB/s
Seq Write (up to)
500 MB/s
Random Read (up to)
98 KIOPs
Random Write (up to)
30 KIOPs
Malaysia's New Storage Technology Solutions Supplier
